title: B2 · Intermedio alto
subtitle: Upper-intermediate Spanish for DELE-style debate, study, public life and real-world issues.
focus: Single-word B2 vocabulary with a small controlled set of useful idiomatic expressions in each group.

groups.title: Argumentación y matices · Nuanced debate
groups.focus: B2 words for building an argument, qualifying claims, weighing evidence and sounding precise.

groups.title: Sociedad y derechos · Public life and civic issues
groups.focus: B2 vocabulary for rights, institutions, inequality, social debate and civic participation.

groups.title: Clima y sostenibilidad · Environment under pressure
groups.focus: B2 vocabulary for climate, resources, consumption, biodiversity and environmental policy.

groups.title: Tecnología y medios · Digital society
groups.focus: B2 vocabulary for digital rights, media literacy, platforms, privacy and technological change.

groups.title: Educación y cultura · Learning and public culture
groups.focus: B2 vocabulary for education, culture, language, access, creativity and academic life.

groups.title: Economía y trabajo · Money, labour and inequality
groups.focus: B2 vocabulary for employment, income, housing, markets, inflation and economic choices.

groups.title: Salud y comunidad · Care, prevention and wellbeing
groups.focus: B2 vocabulary for public health, mental health, care, prevention and community support.

groups.title: Ciudad y vivienda · Urban pressure
groups.focus: B2 vocabulary for housing, neighbourhoods, mobility, tourism, public space and urban change.

groups.title: Ciencia e investigación · Evidence and discovery
groups.focus: B2 vocabulary for research, data, experiments, uncertainty, findings and scientific communication.

groups.title: Retos globales · Policy, migration and change
groups.focus: B2 vocabulary for global challenges, migration, governance, conflict, cooperation and future risks.
